span.p:
Client emits:
send_message / start_new_conversation / switch_mode /
get_history / get_conversations / delete_conversation /
abort_stream / generate_questionnaire / get_export_status

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Server emits:
message / assistant_token / assistant_done / generation_phase
connection_ready / history
conversations_list / conversation_created
conversation_title_updated / conversation_deleted
conversation_mode_updated / stream_aborted
questionnaire_ready (with insert_index)
export_ready / export_status / export_status_not_found /
export_status_error / extraction_failed
